onboarding.notificationBody: Get reminders for due dates, payouts, and group updates so you never miss an important moment.

welcome.title: Save with people you trust
welcome.description: Bring your community savings circle on-chain without losing the familiar group experience.

transparent.title: Track every contribution clearly
transparent.description: Stay on top of payouts, due dates, and group progress with simple updates in one place.

secure.title: Start with confidence
secure.description: Connect your Stellar wallet, manage your security options, and receive helpful reminders when it matters.

settings.title: Security Settings
settings.biometricsNotSupported: Biometrics not supported on this device
settings.setUpPinFallback: Set a PIN below as a fallback when biometrics are unavailable.
settings.setupBiometricsHelper: Please set up fingerprint or face recognition in your device settings, then return here to enable it.
settings.pinDescription: Set a 4-6 digit PIN as a fallback when biometrics are unavailable.
settings.pinFallbackInfo: Used as fallback when biometrics fail
